nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 75. North wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 4pm, then showers and thunderstorms between 4pm and 5pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy. High near 84, with temperatures falling to around 80 in the afternoon. Northeast wind 2 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between three quarters and one inch possible.
